name: Gazpacho Without the Tomatoes (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 3 slices of french bread, crusts removed
2 ounces blanched whole almonds, roughly chopped
salt and freshly ground white pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the slices of bread in cold water until tender.
2. When the bread is soft, squeeze it to express the water.
3. In a food processor, puree the almonds, peppers, cucumbers, vinegar,
sugar, scallions, and olive oil until smooth.
4. Gradually add the ice water, stirring until you achieve your desired
consistency.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Chill the mixture, covered, until serving time.
7. Garnish with diced cucumber, chives, and finely diced red bell pepper.
Yield: about 4 servings
